'''novathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yondermost|yondermost]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yondermost|yondermost]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| novathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:novathithi|novathithi]] || [[word:novathiji|novathiji]] || [[word:novathishi|novathishi]] || [[word:novathiki|novathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:novathuthuthu|novathuthuthu]] || [[word:novathujuju|novathujuju]] || [[word:novathushushu|novathushushu]] || [[word:novathukuku|novathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:novathuthu|novathuthu]] || [[word:novathuju|novathuju]] || [[word:novathushu|novathushu]] || [[word:novathuku|novathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:novathufthuf|novathufthuf]] || [[word:novathufjuf|novathufjuf]] || [[word:novathufshuf|novathufshuf]] || [[word:novathufkuf|novathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:novathethe|novathethe]] || [[word:novatheje|novatheje]] || [[word:novatheshe|novatheshe]] || [[word:novatheke|novatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:novathothotho|novathothotho]] || [[word:novathojojo|novathojojo]] || [[word:novathoshosho|novathoshosho]] || [[word:novathokoko|novathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:novathotho|novathotho]] || [[word:novathojo|novathojo]] || [[word:novathosho|novathosho]] || [[word:novathoko|novathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:novathofthof|novathofthof]] || [[word:novathofjof|novathofjof]] || [[word:novathofshof|novathofshof]] || [[word:novathofkof|novathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:novathïfthïf|novathïfthïf]] || [[word:novathïfjïf|novathïfjïf]] || [[word:novathïfshïf|novathïfshïf]] || [[word:novathïfkïf|novathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:novathïfthïfthïf|novathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:novathïfjïfjïf|novathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:novathïfshïfshïf|novathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:novathïfkïfkïf|novathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:novathïfthïf|novathïfthïf]] || [[word:novathïfjïf|novathïfjïf]] || [[word:novathïfshïf|novathïfshïf]] || [[word:novathïfkïf|novathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:novathïfthïf|novathïfthïf]] || [[word:novathïfjïf|novathïfjïf]] || [[word:novathïfshïf|novathïfshïf]] || [[word:novathïfkïf|novathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:novathæthæ|novathæthæ]] || [[word:novathæjæ|novathæjæ]] || [[word:novathæshæ|novathæshæ]] || [[word:novathækæ|novathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:novathathatha|novathathatha]] || [[word:novathajaja|novathajaja]] || [[word:novathashasha|novathashasha]] || [[word:novathakaka|novathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:novathatha|novathatha]] || [[word:novathaja|novathaja]] || [[word:novathasha|novathasha]] || [[word:novathaka|novathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:novathafthaf|novathafthaf]] || [[word:novathafjaf|novathafjaf]] || [[word:novathafshaf|novathafshaf]] || [[word:novathafkaf|novathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:novathasha|novathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:novathshësha|novathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novathrosha|novathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novathmusha|novathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:novathyasha|novathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovathnkshësha|gonovathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovathnkrosha|gonovathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovathnkmusha|gonovathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovathnkyasha|gonovathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:novavathasha|novavathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:novavathshësha|novavathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novavathrosha|novavathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novavathmusha|novavathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:novavathyasha|novavathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovavathnkshësha|gonovavathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovavathnkrosha|gonovavathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovavathnkmusha|gonovavathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovavathnkyasha|gonovavathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nevæthasha|nevæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nevæthshësha|nevæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nevæthrosha|nevæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nevæthmusha|nevæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nevæthyasha|nevæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonevæthnkshësha|gonevæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonevæthnkrosha|gonevæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonevæthnkmusha|gonevæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonevæthnkyasha|gonevæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:novfathasha|novfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:novfathshësha|novfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:novfathrosha|novfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:novfathmusha|novfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:novfathyasha|novfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonovfathnkshësha|gonovfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonovfathnkrosha|gonovfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonovfathnkmusha|gonovfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonovfathnkyasha|gonovfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
